name: Landing Page
description: Design a complete high-conversion landing page: positioning, copy, structure, and conversion optimization.

steps.name: Positioning
steps.description: Define market positioning and messaging framework

steps.name: Conversion Copy
steps.description: Generate headlines, CTAs, and objection handlers

steps.name: Page Structure
steps.description: Design page sections, layout, and CTA placement

steps.name: Funnel Design
steps.description: Design the acquisition funnel around the landing page

success_criteria: Complete page structure with AIDA flow
